# Ecosystem Extensions {.section .neutral-section}

<p class="section-subtitle">Optional capabilities that expand the evidence and governance around the Protopipe core.</p>

---

## 30. Direct External Signal Feed

<p class="slide-kicker">A single trusted provider can enrich Protopipe with external evidence through a direct, bounded integration.</p>

<div class="extension-badge">Optional SaaS Add-on · Direct Provider Integration</div>

<div class="external-signals">
<div class="external-provider">
<span>Curated provider</span>
<strong>Sellytics</strong>
<p>A potential ecosystem partner for continuously supplied commercial signals such as marketplace prices, rankings, ratings, and reviews.</p>
<a href="https://sellytics.com/">sellytics.com</a>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-contract">
<span>Integration contract</span>
<strong>Source · timestamp · confidence · KPI relation</strong>
<div>
<i>Provider-specific</i>
<i>API-backed</i>
<i>Normalized</i>
<i>Traceable</i>
</div>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-destination">
<span>Core platform</span>
<strong>Reality Signal Matrix + KPI Tree</strong>
<p>Protopipe treats the feed as attributable evidence for hypotheses, KPIs, experiments, and decisions.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="extension-boundary">
<b>Direct feed:</b> One provider supplies a known class of external signals through an integration contract.
<b>Protopipe:</b> Preserves source, timestamp, confidence, and KPI relation.
</div>

---

## 31. External Data Marketplace Vision

<p class="slide-kicker">External evidence is costly to collect and hard to verify. A marketplace can make that work attributable, priced, comparable, and challengeable.</p>

<div class="extension-badge">Derived from Noesis · Optional Ecosystem Layer</div>

<div class="external-signals">
<div class="external-provider">
<span>Provider ecosystem</span>
<strong>Sellytics + specialized providers</strong>
<p>Multiple providers publish costly external evidence under comparable topic contracts.</p>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-contract">
<span>Independent market layer</span>
<strong>Topic contract · provenance · access · reputation</strong>
<div>
<i>Pricing + licensing</i>
<i>Schema-bound topics</i>
<i>Signed commitments</i>
<i>Topic-level reputation</i>
</div>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-destination">
<span>Protopipe subscription</span>
<strong>External Evidence Context</strong>
<p>Protopipe consumes marketplace evidence with provenance, confidence, correction status, and dispute history.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="extension-boundary">
<b>Marketplace:</b> Operate provider identity, payment, access, commitments, reputation, corrections, and disputes.
<b>Protopipe:</b> Stays out of marketplace operation and uses the evidence context for strategic learning.
</div>

<p class="source-note">Derived from Noesis: <em>External Evidence Is Costly and Hard to Verify</em>, <em>No External Signal without Provenance</em>, and <em>External Evidence Context</em>. Publication reference: <a href="../../../../publications/external-data-marketplace-whitepaper.md">External Data Marketplace Whitepaper</a>.</p>

---

## 32. Google Analytics for Physical Retail

<p class="slide-kicker">Instrument the physical store like an online product: connect experiments to observed customer behavior and business outcomes.</p>

<div class="extension-badge">Optional Retail Analytics Add-on · Potential Partner</div>

<div class="external-signals">
<div class="external-provider">
<span>Store reality provider</span>
<strong>Crosscan</strong>
<p>Potential ecosystem partner for measuring visitor frequency, passers-by, dwell time, movement patterns, and demographic signals.</p>
<a href="https://crosscan.com/">crosscan.com</a>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-contract">
<span>Experiment context</span>
<strong>Store · time · intervention · comparison group</strong>
<div>
<i>Footfall + conversion</i>
<i>Dwell time + movement</i>
<i>POS + staffing data</i>
<i>Weather + location context</i>
</div>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-destination">
<span>Protopipe decision model</span>
<strong>Reality Signal Matrix + KPI Tree</strong>
<p>Store behavior fills the internal quadrants. Weather and location context explain external influence without being mistaken for experiment impact.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="extension-boundary">
<b>Experiment:</b> Change a store surface, process, campaign, or staffing model.
<b>Decision:</b> Compare attributed behavior and business impact before scaling.
</div>

<p class="source-note">Potential partner capability reference: <a href="https://crosscan.com/">Crosscan retail analytics</a>.</p>

---

## 33. Industry 5.0: Strategy Reaches the Shopfloor

<p class="slide-kicker">Digitization makes industrial work observable. Protopipe turns that operational reality into strategic learning.</p>

<div class="extension-badge">Optional Industrial Operations Add-on · Potential Partner</div>

<div class="external-signals">
<div class="external-provider">
<span>Shopfloor execution provider</span>
<strong>ekko</strong>
<p>Potential ecosystem partner for paperless picking, eKanban, locationing, digital labeling, and configurable industrial workflows.</p>
<a href="https://www.ekko.io/en">ekko.io</a>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-contract">
<span>Operational evidence</span>
<strong>Order · step · material · location · outcome</strong>
<div>
<i>Digital instructions</i>
<i>Verified process events</i>
<i>Errors + cycle times</i>
<i>REST · webhooks · MQTT</i>
</div>
</div>

<div class="external-arrow">→</div>

<div class="external-destination">
<span>Augmented strategy</span>
<strong>Hypothesis + KPI Tree + Cockpit</strong>
<p>Protopipe relates deterministic process evidence to quality, throughput, resilience, worker experience, and strategic outcomes.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="extension-boundary">
<b>ekko:</b> Make production, warehouse, and logistics processes digital, traceable, and testable.
<b>Protopipe:</b> Decide which operational change creates strategic value and whether the evidence supports scaling it.
</div>

<p class="source-note">Capability references: <a href="https://www.ekko.io/en">ekko shopfloor digitization</a> and <a href="https://research-and-innovation.ec.europa.eu/research-area/industrial-research-and-innovation/industry-50_en">European Commission Industry 5.0</a>.</p>

---

## 34. Synesis: Deliberation with Memory

<p class="slide-kicker">An optional deliberation platform can make perspectives, arguments, evidence, and unresolved conflict part of the decision record.</p>

<div class="extension-badge">Optional Governance Add-on · MVP Concept</div>

<div class="synesis-model">
<div class="synesis-input">
<span>Participants enter with context</span>
<div>
<i><b>Perspective</b>Which reality do I represent?</i>
<i><b>Position</b>What do I currently support?</i>
<i><b>Hypothesis</b>What would change my mind?</i>
</div>
</div>

<div class="synesis-arrow">→</div>

<div class="synesis-core">
<span>Structured deliberation</span>
<strong>Claims · evidence · alternatives · consent</strong>
<div class="synesis-ai">
AI summarizes, clusters arguments, detects repetition, and points new participants to the existing discourse.
</div>
</div>

<div class="synesis-arrow">→</div>

<div class="synesis-output">
<span>Canonical decision memory</span>
<div>
<i>Convergence status</i>
<i>Reasoned vetoes</i>
<i>Open assumptions</i>
<i>Decision rationale</i>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="synesis-integration">
<div>
<span>Habermas</span>
<strong>Target model</strong>
<small>Understanding through reasoned, challengeable argument.</small>
</div>
<div>
<span>Luhmann</span>
<strong>Threat model</strong>
<small>Power, system logic, and self-reference remain explicit risks.</small>
</div>
<div class="learning">
<span>Protopipe</span>
<strong>Decision integration</strong>
<small>The resulting rationale links to strategy, hypothesis, experiment, and KPI Tree.</small>
</div>
</div>

<p class="source-note">Source: <em>Synesis – Diskursplattform für konvergente Entscheidungsfindung</em>, internal MVP canvas.</p>
